ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "business_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_types" (
  "ownership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership type */,
  "ownership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ownership type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_type_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each business type
Unique identifier for each ownership type
